name: Mccarthy Family Fish Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the salt pork until browned. Remove the salt pork pieces and place them in a separate dish. Leave the oil from the salt pork in the pot.
2. Sauté the diced onion in the same pot until browned.
3. Add the cubed potatoes and boiling water to the pot. Simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Add the fresh haddock and simmer for an additional 20 minutes.
5. Stir in the milk, salt, pepper, and the previously sautéed pieces of salt pork.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil before serving.
